captureContract.terminalTraceProvenance: The 10.5 capture source is the repeated no-input trace at tick 9777, Collapsed/IncapacitatedHold, event count 8148, SHA-256 69f3e22402e31a53b1d4c16899883956fcc5fdb14fbe47d8a4eb8baef007174f; it is distinct from the historical 8.0 W2-04 7495-event trace.
captureContract.simulationHourEvidence: Each manifest image records actual and deterministically derived simulation hour; tick-zero frames require 10.5, while ticks 1 and the manifest-recorded terminal tick derive from the recorded day length and tick interval.
captureContract.terminalOutcomeEvidence: terminal_crisis requires Outcome=Collapsed, CollapseCause=IncapacitatedHold, and the authoritative causal summary.
captureContract.graphicsEvidence: capture-manifest.json records the active Godot runtime renderer method and explicit project renderer method or engine_default.
captureContract.poseEvidence: Each frame records canonical and settled camera/player transforms plus FOV; capture fails if controls drift either transform or FOV while frames settle.
captureContract.presentationStateEvidence: Each frame records and requires debug hidden, TerrainOverlayMode.None, and EnvironmentController's actual presentation-lock hour/multiplier.
captureContract.settlementAnimationEvidence: Each frame records expected and settled hub animation phase; capture applies the configured fixed phase and disables hub processing before frame waits.
captureContract.contributionEvidence: contribution_point records player/depot vectors, interaction range, in-range state, and the visible Contributed success cue; the capture script requires the recorded distance to remain within range.
captureContract.captureWorkCleanup: scripts/capture-v3-w2-vis.ps1 removes .capture-work on both success and failure.
captureContract.builtPathConvention: retained distinct BUILT PATH label and opaque warm material
